hero.layout: Full-screen hero section with background image overlay, positioned corner elements, top meta information bar, and centered content with stats grid below
hero.title: Fire safety, engineered with precision.
hero.subtitle: Accepting projects — Q2 / Q3 2026
hero.description: We design, inspect and commission sprinkler & fire suppression systems for pharma, aerospace and heavy industry — across Belgium, Germany and France.

stats.label: Sprinkler success rate — 100+ years field data
Sprinkler heads designed — GSK RX395 alone

services.layout: Two-column grid with interactive tabs on the left and content panel on the right showing title, description, bullet points, and visual schematic diagram
services.sectionTitle: Four disciplines. One standard of work.
services.sectionSubtitle: From first feasibility to final sign-off — we cover the full lifecycle of fire suppression engineering.

services.title: Conceptual design & feasibility.
services.description: We translate a brief, a site visit and your authority's codes into a defensible design basis — risk analysis, water supply study, BOQ and tender-ready documentation.

services.title: Detailed 2D & 3D design.
services.description: Full coordinated drawing sets produced in AutoCAD, Revit and SprinkCAD — wet, dry, pre-action double interlock and deluge systems — with hydraulic calculations to NFPA 13.

services.title: Independent inspections & audits.
services.description: Third-party assessments against NFPA, FM Global, NBN EN, CEA 4001 and ANPI — with clear remediation paths, prioritised by risk and by what your AHJ will actually require.

services.title: Site follow-up & commissioning.
services.description: We act as your technical agent on site — managing subcontractors, witnessing tests, signing off against the design and handing over a fully-documented, code-compliant system.

references.layout: Section with introductory text, two large project showcase cards with SVG schematics and overlay information, followed by a detailed reference list table and client logo grid
references.sectionSubtitle: Pharmaceutical GMP zones, military installations, high-value logistics. A sample of the work — full dossier on request.

projects.title: GSK RX395 — Fire Sprinkler System
projects.description: 2,000+ heads across 11 alarm valve systems — wet and pre-action double interlock.
projects.subtitle: Pharma / GMP · 2024

projects.title: Belgian Air Force — Zutendaal
projects.description: 5 km underground piping, 17 warehouses, new pump house. Full commissioning and sign-off.
projects.subtitle: Defence / Base · 2023

references.title: GSK RX395 — Fire Sprinkler System
references.description: Feasibility, conceptual design, BOQ and full 2D/3D detailed design of 11 alarm valve systems — wet and pre-action double interlock.
references.subtitle: Pharma / GMP · 2024

references.title: GSK WN26 — Fire Remediation
references.description: Protection of GMP production areas, clean rooms and building façade. Wet, deluge and pre-action double interlock systems.
references.subtitle: Pharma / GMP · 2023

references.title: Belgian Air Force — Zutendaal
references.description: New pump house & water tanks, 5 km underground piping, 17 warehouses, workshop, office building and medical storage. Site follow-up, testing and commissioning.
references.subtitle: Defence / Base · 2023

references.title: Takeda Lessines — Plant Extension
references.description: Pre-action sprinkler design for a biologics production expansion. Full hydraulic model and alarm-valve coordination.
references.subtitle: Pharma / GMP · 2022

references.title: Cargill Ghent — Warehouse Upgrade
references.description: FM Global-compliant retrofit of high-pile storage sprinklers over 18,000 m² of logistics floorplate.
references.subtitle: Logistics / FMG · 2022

standards.layout: Grid of standard cards showing code, name, and description, followed by a row of tool badges
standards.sectionTitle: Designed to the codes that get signed off.
standards.sectionSubtitle: Our deliverables are prepared against the specific standard your authority having jurisdiction uses — not a generic template.

standards.title: NFPA 13
standards.subtitle: Sprinkler Systems
standards.description: US / international reference standard for sprinkler installation design.

standards.title: FM Global
standards.subtitle: Property Loss
standards.description: Insurance-driven datasheets for high-value and high-hazard occupancies.

standards.title: NBN EN 12845
standards.subtitle: EU Sprinklers
standards.description: European standard for automatic sprinkler systems — design, installation & maintenance.

standards.title: CEA 4001
standards.subtitle: Insurance EU
standards.description: Specification for sprinkler installations — European insurance framework.

standards.title: ANPI
standards.subtitle: BE Certification
standards.description: Belgian national safety institute — approved inspection body.

standards.title: Royal Decree
standards.subtitle: 28 March 2014
standards.description: Belgian federal fire prevention legislation for workplaces.

standards.title: EN 54
standards.subtitle: Detection & Alarm
standards.description: European standard for fire detection and fire alarm systems.

standards.title: Zone Brabant W.
standards.subtitle: Local AHJ
standards.description: Authority having jurisdiction — Walloon Brabant fire services.

contact.layout: Two-column grid with contact information and details on the left, multi-step contact form on the right
contact.title: Tell us what you're protecting.
contact.subtitle: Three quick questions. You'll hear back from a senior engineer — not a form robot — within one business day.
